summary: Account Health Dashboard tested successfully - ALL 19 backend tests PASS and frontend UI verified. Dashboard shows health scores, summary cards, filter pills, search, and detail pages with 9 metric tiles. Admin page correctly shows Account Health link.
critical_code_review_comments: account_health.py: Health score calculation correctly implements tiered scoring (Activity 40pts, Contacts 20pts, Messages 20pts, Campaigns+Touchpoints 20pts)
account_health.py line 65-70: Grade thresholds correct (>=70 Healthy, >=40 At Risk, <40 Critical) with proper colors
account_health.py line 209-210: Overview sorted by score ascending (worst first) as expected
account-health.tsx: Summary cards correctly show Healthy/At Risk/Critical counts with filter functionality
account-health.tsx lines 117-123: Filter pills (All, Critical, At Risk, Healthy) correctly filter account list
account-health.tsx line 43-50: Filtering logic handles grade matching and search by name/email/org
[id].tsx: Detail page shows all 9 metric tiles (contacts, messages, touchpoints, campaigns, enrollments, tasks, links, clicks, cards)
[id].tsx lines 113-131: Health banner displays score, grade, description, and last login
admin/index.tsx lines 352-358: Account Health link in Customer Infrastructure with correct icon and subtitle
context_for_next_testing_agent: Account Health Dashboard fully tested. Backend API returns 66 accounts sorted by health score (worst first). Overview shows summary cards (0 Healthy, 2 At Risk, 64 Critical). Detail page for Bud Ward shows score=50, grade='At Risk', with 9 metric tiles. Admin page has 'Account Health' link in Customer Infrastructure section.

features_verified.backend_overview_api: PASS - GET /api/account-health/overview returns array of accounts with health scores, metrics, user info
features_verified.backend_user_detail_api: PASS - GET /api/account-health/user/{user_id} returns detailed health report with metrics, event_breakdown, recent_events, account info
features_verified.backend_health_score_calculation: PASS - Scores map correctly to grades (>=70 Healthy, >=40 At Risk, <40 Critical) with proper colors
features_verified.frontend_dashboard_title: PASS - Account Health page shows title '66 accounts tracked'
features_verified.frontend_summary_cards: PASS - Shows Healthy (0), At Risk (2), Critical (64) with icons
features_verified.frontend_filter_pills: PASS - All, Critical, At Risk, Healthy filter pills present and functional
features_verified.frontend_search_box: PASS - Search by name, email, or org input present
features_verified.frontend_period_toggle: PASS - 30d/90d period toggle present and functional
features_verified.frontend_account_list: PASS - Account rows show health score circles, user info, metrics, login recency
features_verified.frontend_detail_health_banner: PASS - Shows score (50), grade (At Risk), description, last login (1d ago)
features_verified.frontend_detail_9_metric_tiles: PASS - All 9 tiles: Total Contacts, Messages Sent, Touchpoints, Active Campaigns, Enrollments, Tasks Done, Links Created, Link Clicks, Cards Shared
features_verified.frontend_detail_account_info: PASS - Shows Email, Role, Organization, Store, Created, TOS Accepted
features_verified.admin_page_account_health_link: PASS - Account Health link in Customer Infrastructure section with 'Retention dashboard & engagement tracking' subtitle
